description: Compressed transmitted keyframe Gaussian anchor payload plus required anchor container metadata.
Keyframe indices, timestamps, quantization bits, tensor shapes, field schema, and codec header metadata.
Any transmitted non-keyframe depth, motion hint, residual, importance map, or correction payload.
Shared decoder/adapter weights are not counted as per-video payload, but must be reported separately where relevant.
Current Mono-DFCGS-KG does not transmit these. Future side-info variants must count them if used.
